## Type of change

- [ ] bug fix
- [ ] new feature (new tool / provider / etc)
- [ ] refactor or cleanup
- [ ] docs
- [ ] ci / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] ran `pytest` and it passes
- [ ] ran `ruff check .` and `black .`
- [ ] added or updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] updated the README / docs if behaviour changed
